subcodes.title: Ziyarat-Namiy-i-Bahiyyih Khanum
subcodes.first_line: This is My testimony for her who hath heard My voice and drawn nigh unto Me. Verily, she is a leaf that hath sprung
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا للتی سمعت و فازت و انها تورقت من هذالاصل القدیم ظهرت باسمی
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @living waters; water of life
